apps.versionDescription: Fix Miruro replay black-screen/line-through failures by restoring full source fallback, adding local proxy warm-up before AVPlayer start, and filtering non-media HLS URI lines while preserving segment order.

versions.localizedDescription: Fix Miruro replay black-screen/line-through failures by restoring full source fallback, adding local proxy warm-up before AVPlayer start, and filtering non-media HLS URI lines while preserving segment order.
